All inline <mark>persNames</mark> must have a ref that points to the personography...
...i.e. do not put a placeName inside of a <mark>persName</mark>.
...Direct references to people should be tagged using the <mark>persName</mark> element that uses the ref attribute to point to...
Do not use <mark>persName</mark> to tag indirect references to people—e.g. The King...
...a person. In these cases, instead of <mark>persName</mark>, use the rs (referring string) element...
